categories.name: Uninhabited Island Picnic
categories.description: A few hours on a private, empty island — snorkeling, a beach picnic, no overnight stay required. The easiest way to try it.

categories.name: One-Night Camping Trip
categories.description: Tents, a campfire dinner, and a night under genuinely dark skies — guided, with all permits and safety equipment arranged.

categories.name: Multi-Day Island Hopping
categories.description: Several uninhabited islands over multiple nights — for a genuinely small group wanting a proper adventure trip.
